base_url.description: NetSuite REST Record API base URL, e.g. https://<account-id>.suitetalk.api.netsuite.com/services/rest/record/v1. Required: legacy derives this from realm when unset (lowercased, underscores replaced with hyphens), but the engine's streams.json base URL is a plain {{ config.base_url }} template with no cross-key derivation mechanism (spec-default materialization only fills a literal per-key default, not a function of another config value) -- the same class of gap as nylas's api_server-derived host and sentry/chargebee's hostname/site-derived URLs (docs/migration/conventions.md). Compute the value using legacy's own derivation (https://<realm-with-underscores-as-hyphens-lowercased>.suitetalk.api.netsuite.com/services/rest/record/v1) and set it explicitly; see docs.md Known limits.

realm.description: NetSuite account id (OAuth 1.0a realm), e.g. 123456 or 123456_SB1. Sent verbatim as the OAuth Authorization header's realm parameter.

consumer_key.description: NetSuite integration record consumer key (OAuth 1.0a oauth_consumer_key). Never logged.

consumer_secret.description: NetSuite integration record consumer secret. Used only to compute the OAuth 1.0a HMAC-SHA256 request signature; never sent on the wire itself, never logged.

token_key.description: NetSuite access token (OAuth 1.0a oauth_token). Never logged.

token_secret.description: NetSuite token secret. Used only to compute the OAuth 1.0a HMAC-SHA256 request signature; never sent on the wire itself, never logged.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-1000, limit query param).

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
